---
title: "Research"
---

<br>

```{r out.width = "50%", fig.align = "center", echo = FALSE}
#knitr::include_graphics("Conference.jpg")

```

<br>

I am currently building collaborations at the University of Iowa, and I am involved in the Clinical Trials Statistical and Data Management Center. At the University of Michigan, I began research on the NIH Cancer Training Grant in Biostatistics in 2016 and was an NSF Graduate Research Fellow. Recently, I was awarded the University of Michigan Department of Biostatistics Excellence in Research Award Honorable Mention.

# Methods Research

Currently, I am interested in survival analysis and causal inference areas. For my dissertation, I am working on methods for surrogate endpoints in clinical trials. My general research interests include clinical trials, surrogate endpoint validation, causal inference, survival analysis, longitudinal measures, Bayesian methods, futility analysis, biomarkers, and cancer applications.

# Collaborative Research

I have worked on several application areas such as head and neck melanoma, lymphoma, prostate cancer, and breast cancer. Additionally, I have experience in collaborative research on COVID-19 testing patterns, microbiome data, and telomere length and race.


## Graduate Fellowships and Funding

Rackham Predoctoral Fellowship Program

National Science Foundation Graduate Research Fellowship Program                    
University of Michigan School of Public Health Regents’ Fellowship Award

National Institutes of Health Cancer Training in Biostatistics Grant Trainee  

R.J. McElroy Fellowship    

NIH U24 AG066528-01: Telomere Research Network, Telomere Research Network Analysis Award, 8/14/20-Present, $4,000, (PI: Stacy Drury). Role: Co-PI on project exploring mediation of the Black/White telomere length difference by persistent organic pollutant exposure.     

Below is a list of my published projects conference presentations. Please refer to my [Google Scholar page](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=yh2UbZEAAAAJ&hl=en) to get a complete list of my papers. 

## Publications

-**Roberts, E.** (2015). Mission of Hope Action Research: Analyzing and Understanding Local Homeless. Undergraduate Journal of Service Learning and Community-Based Research.

-Muller, K. E., **Roberts, E.**, Zhao, L., & Jorns, J. M. (2017). Isolated Atypical Lobular Hyperplasia Diagnosed on Breast Biopsy: Low Upgrade Rate on Subsequent Excision With Long-Term Follow-up. Archives of pathology & laboratory medicine.

-East, E. G., Gast, K. M., Kuzon, W. M., **Roberts, E.**, Zhao, L., & Jorns, J. M. (2017). Clinicopathologic Findings in Female‐to‐Male Gender‐Affirming Breast Surgery. Histopathology.

-Kahn, J. M., Cole, P. D., Blonquist, T. M., T. M., Stevenson, K., Jin, Z., Barrera, S., Davila, R., **Roberts, E.**, [10 authors], Kelly, K.  (2018). An investigation of toxicities and survival in Hispanic children and adolescents with ALL: Results from the Dana‐Farber Cancer Institute ALL Consortium protocol 05‐001. Pediatric blood & cancer, 65(3).

-East, E., Gabbeart, M., **Roberts, E.**, Zhao, L. & Jorns, J. (2018). A Rapid Triage Protocol to Optimize Cold Ischemic Time for Breast Resection Specimens. Annals of Diagnostic Pathology.

-Geer, M.\*, **Roberts, E.**\*, Shango M., Till B., Smith S., Abbas .H, Hill B., Kaplan J., Barr P.M., Caimi P.F., Stephens D.M., Lin E., Herrera A.F., Rosenbaum E., Amengual K., Boonstra P.S., Devata S., Wilcox R.A., Kaminski M., and Phillips T. (2019). Multicentre retrospective study of intravascular large B‐cell lymphoma treated at academic institutions within the United States. British journal of haematology. *equal contribution authors

-East, E. G., **Roberts, E.**, Zhao, L., & Jorns, J. M. (2019). Repeat Biomarker Status in Breast Resection Specimens With Controlled Cold Ischemic Time. American journal of clinical pathology.

-Siontis, B., McHugh, J., **Roberts, E.**, Zhao, L., Thomas, D., Baker, L., Owen, D., Biermann, J.S., Schuetze, S.M., Chugh, R. (2019). Radiation-Associated Versus Sporadic Osteosarcoma: A Single-Institution Experience. Frontiers in Oncology.

-Hanks, J. E., Kovatch, K. J., Ali S. A., **Roberts E.**, Durham, A. B., Smith, J. D., Bradford, C. R., Malloy, K. M., Boonstra, P. S., McLean, S. A. (2020). Sentinel Lymph Node Biopsy in Head & Neck Melanoma: Long-Term Outcomes, Prognostic Value, & Accuracy. Otolaryngology–Head and Neck Surgery.

-Needham, B. L., Salerno, S., **Roberts, E.**, Boss, J., Allgood, K. L., Mukherjee, B. (2020). Do Black/White Differences in Telomere Length Depend on Socioeconomic Status? Biodemography and Social Biology.
Roberts, E. & Zhao, L. (2021). A Bayesian Mixture Model to Estimate Changepoints in Ordinal Predictors. International Journal of Biostatistics (online).

-Sun, Y., Patel, A., SantaLucia, J., **Roberts, E.**, Zhao, L., Kaye, K., Rao, K., Bachman, M. (2021). Measurement of Klebsiella Intestinal Colonization Density to Assess Infection Risk. mSphere.

-**Roberts, E. K.**, Elliott, M.R., Taylor, J.M.G. (2021). Incorporating Baseline Covariates to Validate Surrogate Endpoints with a Constant Biomarker Under Control Arm. Statistics in Medicine.

-Vornhagen, J., **Roberts, E.K.**, … [13 authors] Bachman, M.A. (2022). Comparative Genomics Reveals Plasmid-Encoded Genes Associated with Klebsiella Infection in Colonized Patients. Nature Communications. (https://doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-1254643/v1)

-**Roberts, E.K.**, Elliott, M.R., & Taylor, J.M.G. (2022). Solutions for Surrogacy Validation with Longitudinal Outcomes for a Gene Therapy. Biometrics.

-**Roberts, E.K.**, Gu, T., Mukherjee, B., Fristche, L. (2022). Estimating COVID-19 Vaccination Effectiveness Using Electronic Health Records of an Academic Medical Center in Michigan. AJPM Focus. (https://doi.org/10.1101/2022.01.29.22269971)

*Under Revision and Resubmission*

-**Roberts, E.K.**\*, Boss, J.*, Zota, A., Salerno, S., Mukherjee, B., Needham, B. Mediation Analysis of Race and Environmental Exposures on Telomere Length Using NHANES (1999-2002).

*Under Review*

-Morales, K.A., **Roberts, E.**,..., [21 authors], Mierzwa, M. A matched comparison of toxicity in p16+ oropharynx cancer treated with definitive chemoradiation with or without nivolumab.

## Presentations: Graduate

- Upcoming: WSDS 2022

- Other Internal Presentations at University of Michigan: Graduate Student Working Group (Constructing a Model for Who was Tested for COVID-19 Over Time, 2020; Incorporating Patient Subgroups During Surrogate Endpoint Validation, 2020), Causal Inference Working Group 2020 (Incorporating Patient Subgroups During Surrogate Endpoint Validation, 2020), Senior Research Showcase (Causal inference methods to validate surrogate endpoints with time-to-event data, 2022), various lab meetings

-Evaluating Intermediate Clinical Endpoints for Futility Analysis in Clinical Trials

Poster Presentation at Society for Clinical Trials 2022. Best Poster Award.

-Causal Inference Methods to Validate Surrogate Endpoints in Clinical Trials 

Invited Oral Presentation at Joint Mathematics Meetings (held virtually) April 2022

-Adapting Causal Ideas from Surrogacy Validation of Intermediate Endpoints to Futility Analysis in Clinical Trials
Invited Oral Seminar Presentation for St. Jude Children's Hospital January 2022

-Surrogacy Validation with Longitudinal Outcomes for a Gene Therapy

Invited Oral Seminar Presentation for FDA (held virtually) October 2021

Invited Oral Seminar Presentation for St. Jude Children's Hospital (held virtually) November 2021

Invited Oral Seminar Presentation for University of Michigan November 2021

Invited Oral Seminar Presentation for Vanderbilt University December 2021

Invited Oral Seminar Presentation for University of Iowa (held virtually) January 2022

Invited Oral Seminar Presentation for University of Minnesota (held virtually) January 2022

Contributed Oral Presentation ENAR March 2022

Contributed Oral Presentation JSM August 2022

-Mediation Analysis of Race and Environmental Exposures on Telomere Length using Data from the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (1999-2002) 

Poster Presentation at Telomere Research Network Conference December 2021

-Incorporating Longitudinal Outcomes and Baseline Covariates to Validate Surrogate Endpoints

Poster Presentation at Biopharmaceutical Workshop (held virtually) September 2021 

Invited Oral Seminar Presentation for St. Jude Children's Hospital (held virtually) September 2021

-Incorporating Baseline Covariates to Validate Surrogate Endpoints with a Constant Biomarker Under Control Arm

Oral Presentation at ENAR (held virtually) March 2021

Oral Presentation at Society for Clinical Trials Annual Conference (held virtually) May 2021

Oral Presentation at 2021 International Society for Clinical Biostatistics Conference (held virtually) July 2021

-Validating Surrogate Endpoints with Longitudinal Outcomes

Poster Presentation at Michigan Institute for Data Science (MIDAS) Annual Symposium (held virtually) November 2020

Speed Oral and Poster Presentation at Michigan Student Symposium for Interdisciplinary Statistics Symposium (held virtually) February 2021: "Best Speed Oral Presentation" Presentation/Poster Award

Speed Talk at Joint Statistical Meetings August 2021 (held virtually)

-Exposure to carcinogens and racial differences in leukocyte telomere length: Mediation analysis of race and environmental exposures

Invited Oral Presentation (held virtually) at Telomere Research Network Conference December 2020

Oral Presentation (held virtually) at MIDAS Data for Public Good Symposium February 2021

-Incorporating Subgroups in a Surrogate Endpoint Setting

Invited Oral Presentation at ENAR Nashville, TN (held virtually) March 2020

Michigan Student Symposium for Interdisciplinary Statistical Sciences (MSSISS) Annual Symposium February 2020: "Best Speed Oral Presentation" Presentation/Poster Award

Michigan Institute for Data Science (MIDAS) Annual Symposium November 2019: "Most Likely to Make an Impact in the Field" Poster Award

Poster Presentation at Joint Statistical Meetings, Denver, CO July 2019, Michigan Rogel Cancer Center Spring Symposium 2019, SAMSI Causal Inference Workshop Durham, NC December 2019

-A Bayesian Mixture Model to Estimate the Effect of an Ordinal Predictor 

Poster Presentation at ENAR Philadelphia, PA March 2019, Michigan Student Symposium for Interdisciplinary Statistical Sciences 2019

-Association of Telomere Length and Race:  SES as a Potential Effect Modifier

Poster Presentation at MIDAS Data for Public Good Symposium 2019

## Presentations: Undergraduate

-Differential Outcomes by SES in Children Undergoing Treatment for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia

-Oral Presentation at Harvard Pipeline to Biostatistics 2015, Coe Math Department Colloquium 2015, Rice University Gulf Coast Undergraduate Research Symposium 2015, Nebraska Conference for Undergraduate Women in Mathematics 2016 

-Roommate Matching by Design: A Computational Approach and Analysis
Poster Presentation at Coe Research Symposium 2014, Oral Presentation at Psychology Research Symposium 2014, Coe Research Symposium 2016 (Honors Thesis)

-Evaluation of the CARING Preschool Program
Poster Presentation Columbia University 2014, Oral Presentation at Coe Math Department Colloquium 2014, Coe Research Symposium 2015  

-Mission of Hope Action Research
Oral Presentation at Coe Research Symposium 2015
